summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that a crafted array-form callback reaches the unescaped eval path in call_user_func_array, executes attacker-controlled JavaScript during callback resolution, and returns an attacker-selected callable.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should print EVOHUNT_CALL_USER_FUNC_ARRAY_CODE_EXEC_CONFIRMED after attacker-controlled JavaScript executes during callback resolution, and the returned callable should execute attacker-selected code.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned locutus at 57ea89d4da3b9bcfc983fd27da77a1bdd5d53f01, built the reproduction image, printed EVOHUNT_CALL_USER_FUNC_ARRAY_CODE_EXEC_CONFIRMED, printed that the returned callable executed attacker-selected body 1337, and exited successfully.
verification_method: verify.js requires the vulnerable helper from the mounted checkout, triggers the cb[1] injection, asserts that a global proof marker was set during eval, and checks that the returned callable executes the attacker-selected body.
evidence_produced_by_run: The verification helper confirmed that attacker-controlled JavaScript set the proof marker before normal callback validation completed.
The returned callable executed attacker-selected code and printed 1337.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh shallow-clones the target repository on the host from the v2.0.38 tag, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container.
